title: Stakeholder Outcomes, Authorization, Ethics, Privacy, and Evidence · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent site owner provides a different origin, URL space, markup fault, indexing policy, accessibility need, resource budget, dynamic boundary, and failure condition and transfers stakeholder outcomes, authorization, ethics, privacy, and evidence into a changed authorized stakeholder and evidence charter. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of authorized stakeholder and evidence charter with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predicti…
objectives: Define the stakeholder decision, users, page population, evidence, success, failure, review cadence, and observable value before choosing crawler technology.
Record who controls the target, what access is authorized, which identities and paths are permitted, and who can pause or revoke the crawl.
Separate technical policy from terms, contracts, copyright, privacy, and jurisdiction questions and route uncertain cases to qualified review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Stakeholder Outcome
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab site-quality team handles case 8680 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate the crawl charter on authorization, stakeholder value, minimized data, and honest evidence limits; automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance; then change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-evidence-boundaries-rhesjs
# Competency: scraper-evidence-boundaries.
# Case 1844: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: personal data must remain minimized and redacted.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def evidence_scraper_evidence_boundaries_rhesjs(authorized: bool = True, acceptance_cases: int = 8, minimized_fields: int = 6, retained_fields: int = 6, transfer_gates_named: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_rhesjs = "rhesjs-sjsehr-1844"
    assert evidence_variant_rhesjs
    evidence_axes_rhesjs = (
        "authorizationrhesjs",
        "url1844",
        "responsesjsehr",
        "treerhesjs1844",
        "frontier1844rhesjs",
        "reportsjsehr1844",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_rhesjs)) == 6
    if not authorized:
        return False, acceptance_cases, "authorization-missing"
    if acceptance_cases < 4:
        return False, acceptance_cases, "outcome-underdefined"
    if minimized_fields < 1 or retained_fields != minimized_fields:
        return False, retained_fields, "data-minimization"
    if not transfer_gates_named:
        return False, retained_fields, "evidence-overclaim"
    assert authorized and acceptance_cases >= 4
    return True, acceptance_cases, "authorized-crawl-charter"
